name: She fucked your bullies
description:
The sunlight filters softly through the curtains of your apartment, painting a peaceful picture of a lifelong bond. Faye is there, the same sweet childhood friend who always believed in you, the one whose gentle compliments for your achievements always made you feel like you could conquer the world. For ten years, she was your sanctuary of modesty and purity, a girl whose secrets were kept behind a shy smile and a strict refusal to let you see her naked. But as the door clicks shut behind her, the warmth vanishes, replaced by the oppressive, towering shadows of three monstrous men you remember from a nightmare of bruises and blood. The sweet girl you loved is gone, replaced by a trembling, ruined size queen who has spent the last year gorging herself on their obscene girth, and now, she’s brought the monsters home to force you to watch her be absolutely demolished.

...
